title: lasianthus longifolius
intro: Lasianthus longifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea bush or long-leaf lasianthus. It is a shrub or small tree native to Asia, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against infections. The leaves and stems of the Lasianthus longifolius plant are often prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
